title: rubus × castaneicola
intro: Rubus × castaneicola, also known as the Castanea raspberry or Castanea hybrid raspberry, is a hybrid plant species that results from the cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the chestnut-leaved raspberry (Rubus caesius). The medicinal properties of Rubus × castaneicola include its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant offers several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus × castaneicola can be found in teas, tinctures, and jams, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of menopause, arthritis, and digestive issues.
